entities.official_desc_en: Your first Attack each combat deals 8 additional damage.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你在每场战斗中的第一次攻击造成8点额外伤害

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 10 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗开始时获得10点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with 1 Energy 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 到达休息处后的下一场战斗开始时获得1点能量1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional 1 Energy next turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 如果你在回合中不打出任何攻击牌，在下一回合得到一点额外1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, Transform 3 cards, then Upgrade them.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，选择3张牌进行变化，然后将这些牌升级。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人1层易伤。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽2张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you play a Power card, heal 2 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你打出一张能力牌，回复2点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Replaces Burning Blood. At the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 替换燃烧之血。在战斗结束时，回复12点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Elites drop an additional relic when defeated.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 精英敌人在被打败时多掉落一件遗物。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, heal 2 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，回复2点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you gain Gold, heal 5 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你获得金币时，回复5点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Unplayable Curse cards can now be played. Whenever you play a Curse, lose 1 HP and Exhaust it.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 可以打出原本不能被打出的诅咒牌， 打出诅咒牌会让你失去1点生命并将其消耗。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, choose an Attack. Start each combat with this card in your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，选择一张攻击牌。在每场战斗开始时，这张牌会出现在手牌中。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Start each combat with {selected_card_name} in your hand.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将 {selected_card_name} 放入你的手牌。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Start each combat with {selected_card_name} in your hand.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将 {selected_card_name} 放入你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, choose a Skill. Start each combat with this card in your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，选择一张技能牌。在每场战斗开始时，这张牌会出现在手牌中。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Start each combat with {selected_card_name} in your hand.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将 {selected_card_name} 放入你的手牌。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Start each combat with {selected_card_name} in your hand.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将 {selected_card_name} 放入你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, choose a Power card. Start each combat with this card in your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，选择一张能力牌。在每场战斗开始时，这张牌会出现在手牌中。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Start each combat with {selected_card_name} in your hand.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将 {selected_card_name} 放入你的手牌。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Start each combat with {selected_card_name} in your hand.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将 {selected_card_name} 放入你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Strength and ALL enemies gain 1 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的每个回合开始时，你获得2点力量，所有敌人也获得1力量。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 3 Thorns.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得3点荆棘。

entities.official_desc_en: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在战斗结束时，回复6点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. Future card rewards have 2 less cards to choose from.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。在卡牌奖励画面，可供选择的牌数减少2张。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your turn, lose 15 Block rather than all of your Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的回合开始时，不再失去所有格挡，而是失去15点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, obtain a unique Curse and 3 relics.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 获得一个独特的诅咒和3件遗物。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 18 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的第三回合开始时，获得18点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, brews 5 random potions.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，制作5瓶随机药水。

entities.official_desc_en: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw 3 cards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你在每场战斗中第一次损伤生命时，抽3张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you add a card to your deck, gain 9 Gold.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每次你往自己的牌组中加入一张卡牌时，获得9金币。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you apply Vulnerable, apply 1 Weak.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你给予易伤时，同时给予1层虚弱。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你消耗一张牌，对所有敌人造成3点伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: The effects of your cost X cards are increased by 2.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 耗能为 X 的牌的效果数值增加2点。

entities.official_desc_en: Collect as many as you can.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 多多益善。

entities.official_desc_en: At the end of your turn, gain 1 Block for each card in your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的回合结束时，每有一张手牌获得1点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 1 Artifact.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗开始时，获得1层人工制品。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. You can no longer Rest at Rest Sites.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你无法再在休息处休息。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时， 生成1个闪电充能球。

entities.official_desc_en: You feel more talkative.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你觉得自己有开腔的欲望。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. Whenever you open a non-Boss chest, obtain a Curse.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你每次打开一个非Boss宝箱，都会获得一张诅咒。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Mantra.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的回合开始时，获得1层真言。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you obtain a Curse, increase your Max HP by 6.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你获得一张诅咒，将你的最大生命值提高6。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 1 Focus.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点集中。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you Exhaust a card, add a random card into your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你消耗一张牌，增加一张随机卡牌到你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in your deck.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，从你的牌组中选择一张牌进行复制。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you Rest, you may add a card into your deck.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你休息时，可以增加一张牌到你的牌组。

entities.official_desc_en: For each Curse in your deck, start each combat with 1 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你的牌组中每有一张诅咒牌，你在战斗开始时就额外获得1点力量。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: this.counter == 0 ? this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1 Strength.this.DESCRIPTIONS[2] : this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1 Strength. You have this.counter Curses.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: this.counter == 0 ? this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1点力量。this.DESCRIPTIONS[2] : this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1点力量。你有 this.counter 张诅咒牌。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: this.counter == 0 ? this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1 Strength.this.DESCRIPTIONS[2] : this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1 Strength. You have this.counter Curses.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: this.counter == 0 ? this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1点力量。this.DESCRIPTIONS[2] : this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1点力量。你有 this.counter 张诅咒牌。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: this.counter == 0 ? this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1 Strength.this.DESCRIPTIONS[2] : this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1 Strength. You have this.counter Curses.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: this.counter == 0 ? this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1点力量。this.DESCRIPTIONS[2] : this.DESCRIPTIONS[0]1点力量。你有 this.counter 张诅咒牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 temporary Dexterity.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每回合中，你每次打出一张攻击牌，获得1点临时敏捷。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. You can no longer gain Gold.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在回合开始时获得1点能量。你不能再获得任何金币。

entities.official_desc_en: If you lost HP during the previous turn, trigger the passive ability of all Orbs at the start of your turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时，如果你在之前回合受到过伤害，则触发所有充能球的被动效果。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your deck.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，选择移除牌组中的2张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, add a random Power card into your hand. It costs 0 for that turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗开始时增加一张随机能力牌到你的手牌，这张牌在第一回合的耗能变为0。

entities.official_desc_en: For every 5 cards in your deck, heal 3 HP whenever you enter a Rest Site.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你牌组中每有5张牌，当你进入休息处时就会回复3点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: At the end of combat, raise your Max HP by 1.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗后你的最大生命值增加1。

entities.official_desc_en: Prevent the first time you would lose HP each combat.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 阻止你在每场战斗中第一次受到的生命值损伤。

entities.official_desc_en: Replaces Cracked Core. If you end your turn with any empty Orb slots, Channel 1 Frost.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 替换破损核心。如果你在你的回合结束时还有空余的充能球栏位， 生成1个冰霜充能球。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you add a Power card into your deck, Upgrade it.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你获得能力牌时，将其升级。

entities.official_desc_en: When viewing your Draw Pile, the cards are now shown in order.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 现在观看抽牌堆时，卡牌将按顺序排列。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. You can no longer Smith at Rest Sites.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你无法再在休息处锻造升级卡牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，丢弃任意张牌，然后抽相同数量张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: You can no longer become Weakened.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你不会再被虚弱。

entities.official_desc_en: You can now gain Strength at Rest Sites (up to 3 times).
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你现在能在休息处获得力量。（最多3次）

entities.official_desc_en: Your rightmost Orb triggers its passive an additional time.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你最右侧的充能球会额外触发一次被动效果。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you Scry, Scry 2 additional cards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每次预见时，额外预见2张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Enemies drop 25% more Gold.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 敌人掉落的金币增加25%。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever an enemy dies, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当有一名敌人死亡，获得1点能量并抽1张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 1 Weak.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，你拥有1层虚弱。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you break an enemy's Block, apply 2 Vulnerable.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你突破敌人的格挡时，给予其2层易伤。

entities.official_desc_en: Every 3 turns, gain 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每3个回合，获得1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: Replaces Pure Water. At the start of each combat, add 3 Miracles into your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将3张奇迹放入你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your 2nd turn, gain 14 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的第二回合开始时，获得14点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你在每回合第一次弃牌时，获得1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: Energy is now conserved between turns.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 多余的能量可以留到下一回合。

entities.official_desc_en: Every 6 turns, gain 1 Intangible.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每6回合，获得1层无实体。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you play 10 cards, draw 1 card.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每打出10张牌，抽1张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Every 2 turns, gain 1 Orb slot.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每2回合，获得1个充能球栏位。

entities.official_desc_en: Normal enemy combats are no longer encountered in ? rooms.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你在 ? 房间中不会再遭遇常规战斗。

entities.official_desc_en: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Dexterity.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，获得1点敏捷。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with an additional 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗的第一回合获得1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7 and heal all of your HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升7点，并回复所有生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Every time you play 3 Skills in a single turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出3张技能牌，对所有敌人造成5点伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: When you would die, heal to 50% of your Max HP instead (works once).
entities.official_desc_zhs: 当你要被杀死时，免死并回复到最大生命值的50% （仅能起效一次）。

entities.official_desc_en: Healing is 50% more effective during combat.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 战斗中的回复效果提升50%。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 14.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升14。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain [R] at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, shuffle 2 Wounds into your draw pile.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每回合开始获得 [R]。在战斗开始时，将2张伤口放入你的抽牌堆。

entities.official_desc_en: You can no longer heal.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你无法再回复生命。

entities.official_desc_en: The next 2 non-Boss chests you open contain 2 Relics.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你接下来打开的2个宝箱内会有2件遗物。 （Boss宝箱除外）

stateful_description_variants.description_en: This relic has been used up.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 这件遗物的效果已经被用完。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: The next non-Boss chest you open contains 2 Relics.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 你接下来打开的1个宝箱内会有2件遗物。 （Boss宝箱除外）

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you climb a floor, gain 12 Gold. No longer works when you spend any Gold at a shop.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每攀爬一层楼层获得12金币。一旦在商店中花费金币就会失效。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: This relic has been used up.

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you enter a shop, heal 15 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你进入商店房间时，回复15点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: If your HP is at or below 50% at the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 如果你在战斗结束时生命值等于或低于50%，回复12点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Unplayable Status cards can now be played. Whenever you play a Status card, Exhaust it.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 可以打出原本不能被打出的状态牌。打出状态牌会将其消耗。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, Scry 3.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每次将抽牌堆洗牌时， 预见3。

entities.official_desc_en: 50% discount on all products!
entities.official_desc_zhs: 所有商品打折50%！

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your turn, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的回合开始时，对所有敌人造成3点伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you add an Attack into your deck, Upgrade it.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你获得攻击牌时，将其升级。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you play a Power card, a random card in your hand costs 0 that turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每打出一张能力牌，手牌中就有一张随机牌在这个回合耗能变为0。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 3 Strength. At the end of your first turn, lose 3 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时获得3点力量，在你的第一个回合结束时失去3点力量。

entities.official_desc_en: The first Attack played each turn that costs 2 or more is played twice. Upon pickup, obtain a special Curse.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每回合打出的第一张耗能大于等于2的攻击牌将被打出两次。当你拾起这件遗物时，被诅咒。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: The first Attack played each turn that costs 2 or more is played twice.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 你每回合打出的第一张耗能大于等于2的攻击牌将被打出两次。

entities.official_desc_en: Enemies in your first 3 combats will have 1 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 接下来3场战斗中的敌人将只有1点生命。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: This relic has been used up.

entities.official_desc_en: At the end of your turn, you may shuffle 1 of 3 random cards into your draw pile.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合结束时，你可以从3张随机牌中选择1张，随机洗入你的抽牌堆。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, add 3 Shivs into your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗开始时，手牌中增加3张小刀。

entities.official_desc_en: Triple the chance of finding Rare cards from combat rewards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 使你在怪物奖励中遇见稀有牌的几率变为三倍。

entities.official_desc_en: The next non-Boss chest you open is empty.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你打开的下一个非Boss宝箱将是空的。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Plasma.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时， 生成1个等离子充能球。

entities.official_desc_en: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每打出10张攻击牌，获得1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: When Vulnerable, take 25% more attack damage rather than 50%.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 当你有易伤状态时，受到的额外伤害从50% 下降为25%。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 1 Dexterity.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点敏捷。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, gain 300 Gold.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，获得300金币。

entities.official_desc_en: Negate the next 2 Curses you obtain.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 抵消你下2次获得的诅咒。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Negate the next Curse you obtain.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 抵消你下一次获得的诅咒。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: Negate the next Curse you obtain.
stateful_description_variants.description_zhs: 抵消你下一次获得的诅咒。

stateful_description_variants.description_en: This relic has been used up.

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you play a Power, Attack, and Skill in the same turn, remove all of your debuffs.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出能力牌、 攻击牌和技能牌各一张，移除你身上的所有负面效果。

entities.official_desc_en: If you end your turn without Block, gain 6 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何格挡，获得6点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 4 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，就获得4点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, choose and add 5 cards to your deck.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 选择5张牌加入你的牌组。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, Transform all Strike and Defend cards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 变化所有“打击”和“防御”牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of Boss combats, heal 25 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在Boss战开始时，回复25点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Enemies with Weak deal 40% less damage rather than 25%.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 有虚弱状态的敌人造成的伤害降低40% 而非25%。

entities.official_desc_en: Enemies with Vulnerable take 75% more damage rather than 50%.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 有易伤状态的敌人受到的伤害增加75% 而非50%。

entities.official_desc_en: You can now remove cards from your deck at Rest Sites.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 现在你可以在休息处移除你牌组中的牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 10.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升10。

entities.official_desc_en: Every 10th Attack you play deals double damage.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每打出的第10张攻击牌将会造成双倍伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. ALL enemies start combat with 1 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。所有敌人初始获得1点力量。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you play 3 or less cards during your turn, draw 3 additional cards at the start of your next turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 若你在某个回合打出的牌少于等于3张，则在你的下个回合开始时额外抽3张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, gain 2 Potion slots.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，获得2个药水栏位。

entities.official_desc_en: Normal enemies drop an additional card reward.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 普通敌人多掉落一次卡牌奖励。

entities.official_desc_en: Enemies in Elite combats have 25% less HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 精英战中的敌人生命减少25%。

entities.official_desc_en: Combat reward screens now contain Colorless cards and cards from other colors.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 战斗奖励掉落的卡牌现在会包括无色牌和其他颜色的牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, add a Miracle into your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张奇迹放入你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Future card rewards have 1 additional card to choose from.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在选奖励牌时，可供选择的牌数增加1张。（拾起时同一窗口中的奖励牌不受影响）

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Weak to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人1层虚弱。

entities.official_desc_en: While your HP is at or below 50%, you have 3 additional Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 当你的生命值等于或低于50% 时， 你获得额外3点力量。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you Rest, heal an additional 15 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在休息时额外回复15点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Replaces Ring of the Snake. At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 替换蛇之戒指。在你的每个回合开始时，额外抽1张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽2张牌。
entities.resolution_notes: Huiji reference page missing; local official translation retained.

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 3 additional Orb slots.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗开始时，获得3个额外充能球栏位。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you lose HP, draw 1 card.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你失去生命时，抽1张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. You can no longer see enemy intents.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你无法再看见敌人的意图。

entities.official_desc_en: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你在回合结束时不再自动丢弃所有手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Double the effectiveness of potions.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 药水的效果翻倍。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you lose HP, gain 3 Block next turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你在战斗中失去生命，就在下回合获得3点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: You can now Dig for relics at Rest Sites.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 现在你可以在休息处挖掘遗物。

entities.official_desc_en: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，获得1点力量。

entities.official_desc_en: When adding cards into your deck, you may raise your Max HP by 2 instead.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 可以将卡牌奖励转变为 +2最大生命值。

entities.official_desc_en: During Boss and Elite combats, gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在Boss战与精英战中，你在每回合开始时获得1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each Elite combat with 2 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在与精英敌人战斗时，获得2点力量。

entities.official_desc_en: The Merchant's card removal service now always costs 50 Gold.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 商人的卡牌移除服务现在价格永远是50金币。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards. Start each combat Confused.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每回合多抽2张牌。每场战斗开始时获得混乱效果。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you apply Poison, apply an additional 1 Poison.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你给予敌人中毒状态时，额外给予1层中毒。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你无法再获得药水。

entities.official_desc_en: It's unpleasant.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 不管怎么看都很不舒服。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you enter a ? room, gain 50 Gold.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每次进入?房间时获得50金币。

entities.official_desc_en: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在第7回合结束时，对所有敌人造成52点伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: Cards which Exhaust when played will instead discard 50% of the time.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 应该消耗的牌在被打出时会有50% 几率只被丢弃。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升7。

entities.official_desc_en: Cards containing "Strike" deal 3 additional damage.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 名字中有“打击”的卡牌造成3点额外伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: Every 3 times you shuffle your draw pile, gain 1 Energy 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每洗牌3次，获得1点能量1点能量。
entities.resolution_notes: Huiji reference page missing; local official translation retained.

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时， 生成1个黑暗充能球。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat in Calm.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每场战斗开始时处于平静。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, gain 6 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每次将抽牌堆洗牌时，获得6点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you would deal 4 or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to 5.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你造成小于等于4点未被格挡的攻击伤害时，将伤害提升为5。

entities.official_desc_en: The Merchant restocks cards, relics, and potions. All prices are reduced by 20%.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 商人的卡牌、遗物和药水不再会卖光，并且所有商品打折20%。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any Poison it has to a random enemy.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当有敌人死去时，将其身上的中毒层数移到一名随机敌人身上。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 4 Plated Armor.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得4层多层护甲。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就对一名随机敌人造成3点伤害。

entities.official_desc_en: Every 4th ? room is a Treasure room.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每4个 ? 房间的最后一个必是宝箱房。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, obtain 1 potion. Gain 50 Gold. Raise your Max HP by 5. Obtain 1 card. Upgrade 1 random card.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，获得1瓶药水。获得50金币。将你的最大生命值提升5。获得1张牌。随机升级1张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your hand.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，你可以从3张随机无色牌中选择1张增加到你的手牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you would receive 5 or less unblocked attack damage, reduce it to 1.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你受到小于等于5点的未被格挡攻击伤害时，将伤害降低为1。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 Block.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就获得3点格挡。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you add a Skill into your deck, Upgrade it.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每当你获得技能牌时，将其升级。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you use a potion, heal 5 HP.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每使用一瓶药水，回复5点生命。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你每次失去生命时，减少失去的生命值1点。

entities.official_desc_en: You can no longer become Frail.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你不会再被脆弱。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of each combat, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人4层中毒。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you have no cards in hand during your turn, draw a card.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的回合，当你没有手牌时，抽一张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Start each combat with 1 Strength.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点力量。

entities.official_desc_en: Gain 1 Energy at the start of your turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你每回合不能打出超过6张牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Whenever you exit Calm, gain an additional 1 Energy .
entities.official_desc_zhs: 每次你离开平静时，获得一点额外1点能量。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Skills.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，随机升级2张技能牌。

entities.official_desc_en: At the start of your turn, Upgrade a random card in your hand for the rest of combat.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 在你的每个回合开始时，随机升级一张你的手牌（只影响本场战斗）。

entities.official_desc_en: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Attacks.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 拾起时，随机升级2张攻击牌。

entities.official_desc_en: Potions always appear in combat rewards.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 战斗结束后必定掉落药水。

entities.official_desc_en: You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to 3 times.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 你在选择下一层的房间时有3次机会可以无视当前的路线。

entities.official_desc_en: Attacks that cost 0 deal 4 additional damage.
entities.official_desc_zhs: 费用为0的攻击牌额外造成4点伤害。
